# Copilot Instructions — platelet-wcm

This repository's authoritative project guidance lives in
[`CLAUDE.md`](../CLAUDE.md) at the repo root. GitHub Copilot Chat (and any
other AI tooling that reads this file) should treat `CLAUDE.md` as the
source of truth for:

- Project overview, build & run commands, test invocation
- Architecture of `wholecell/` (framework) vs `models/platelet/` (model)
  vs `reconstruction/platelet/` (parameters)
- Code style and conventions
- Webapp / Docker / Azure deployment surface

For the live state of the calcium signalling work — the model's headline
biology — the most recent dated file under
[`reports/lab-books/`](../reports/lab-books/) is the source of truth.
